mainEntity.name: What is the ROI timeline for AEO in Los Angeles?
mainEntity.text: What is the ROI timeline for AEO in Los Angeles?

acceptedAnswer.text: LA AEO ROI starts at 3 months with 20% lead increase, peaking at 12 months with 50-100% growth via AI citations.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Initial schema/content yields quick wins; authority builds long-term. Track via call tracking. LA costs are high, but ROI beats Ads for volume. Budget for 6-month minimum; premature quits forfeit gains.[1]
